text:
The Strange Chicken Meat (ヘンナトリの肉, Hen'natori no Niku) is an item found in Midonite. Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein 

Item Description

Chicken that is refreshing and has no peculiarity.

Plot

Altar of Dragon Vein

The Strange Chicken Meat is one of the four ingredients that Gourmet Hunter Menchi requests for her sidequest, obtained after killing a Strange Chicken.
